products.name: LawFlow Pro
products.category: Legal AI intake and operations platform
products.shortSummary: LawFlow Pro turns calls, messages and enquiries into structured legal actions with AI-assisted intake, matter matching, conflict-aware routing, follow-up, audit control and solicitor-side AI support.
products.longSummary: LawFlow Pro is a controlled legal operations product for modern law firms. It helps firms capture enquiries, structure matter intake, route callbacks and urgent actions, support conflict-aware decision points, maintain audit visibility and give solicitors access to AI support for day-to-day operational tasks.
whoItIsFor: Law firms missing calls or losing callback opportunities
Firms that need cleaner intake records
Firms that want structured matter capture before hand-off
Firms that need conflict-aware routing and restricted-record control
Firms that want solicitor-side AI support without losing audit discipline
Firms moving from manual intake/admin to controlled AI-assisted operations
problemsSolved: Conflict-sensitive enquiries reaching the wrong workflow
Lack of visibility across intake, callbacks and actions
coreFeatures: Email, SMS and WhatsApp follow-up support

modules.name: Dashboard
modules.description: Live overview of matters, callbacks, consultations, staff status and legal actions.

modules.name: Matter Intake
modules.description: Structured capture of new enquiries, matter details and required follow-up.

modules.name: Consultations
modules.description: Track booked consultations, fact-finds and appointment outcomes.

modules.name: Solicitors
modules.description: Staff, availability and routing ownership for legal work.

modules.name: Callbacks
modules.description: Callback requests, urgency, ownership and follow-up status.

modules.name: Restricted Records
modules.description: Restricted or sensitive matters that need controlled access.

modules.name: Entity Management
modules.description: Clients, related parties, matter links and relationship checks.

modules.name: Conflict Admin
modules.description: Conflict review, decision support and audit-controlled checks.

modules.name: Audit Centre
modules.description: Activity history, compliance evidence and accountability trail.

modules.name: AI Helper
modules.description: Solicitor-side AI support for emails, updates, reminders, research and admin.

modules.name: Call Flow Designer
modules.description: Configurable workflows for calls, messages, intake routes and follow-up automation.

modules.name: Test Lab
modules.description: Safe testing area for workflow checks, regression evidence, feature validation and controlled release confidence.

aiHelperCapabilities: Work within controlled permissions and audit boundaries
commercialValue: Move potential clients toward a conversation faster
Keep sensitive work inside controlled workflows
deliveryModel: Can be delivered as a focused monthly AI service
Can be expanded into a fuller product platform
Can be custom-built or managed by Frontline AI
Starts with a focused fact-find/demo to map the first workflow worth building
products.pricingPosition: Book a call/demo for pricing. Pricing depends on scope, product configuration, support level and whether the firm wants a managed monthly service or a deeper custom build.

products.name: GaragePro
products.shortSummary: GaragePro helps garages recover missed calls, capture booking requests, answer service enquiries and keep customers moving toward appointments.

products.name: Clinic AI
products.shortSummary: A future product direction for clinics that need help with appointment requests, patient enquiries and controlled non-clinical routing.

products.name: TableBoss
products.shortSummary: TableBoss helps hospitality businesses handle booking questions, event enquiries, follow-up messages and customer requests when staff are busy.

products.name: PropertyDesk
products.shortSummary: PropertyDesk helps estate agents capture viewing requests, valuation leads and property enquiries quickly, then keep follow-up moving with clearer ownership and reminders.

products.name: SalonBoss
products.category: Salon AI booking and reminder support
products.shortSummary: SalonBoss helps salons capture booking enquiries, send reminders, recover missed calls and keep repeat revenue moving without adding front-desk pressure.
